title: Gartner's Latest Forecast: Global AI Model and Platform Market to Grow Rapidly, Reaching $64 Billion by 2026
excerpt: According to the latest forecast by the authoritative research firm Gartner, global end-user spending on AI models and platforms is set to experience explosive
content_html:
According to the latest forecast by the authoritative research firm Gartner, global end-user spending on AI models and platforms is set to experience explosive growth. The market size in this area is expected to reach $64.052 billion by 2026, representing a significant increase of 63.4% compared to last year.

In terms of specific expenditures, investment in generative AI models is growing particularly rapidly, with an increase of as high as 117%. At the same time, corporate spending on AI platforms is also continuously expanding, expected to achieve a steady growth of 36.9%.

Market Shifts Toward Efficiency-First, Cost and Return Are Under Strict Scrutiny

As AI technology becomes widely implemented, companies are increasingly scrutinizing budgets for AI projects. The current market focus has fully shifted toward the efficiency of fund usage, cost control, and the ability to deliver measurable practical benefits.

Facing this change, funds are accelerating toward suppliers that can clearly demonstrate value. In particular, products that can provide evidence in controlling costs, reducing latency, improving performance, and ensuring reliability are more likely to stand out in competition.

Transparent Services Become an Advantage, Platform Suppliers Will Take the Lead

To adapt to this trend, many vendors are embedding evaluation mechanisms, cost transparency, and usage tracking directly into customer workflows. This approach allows companies to manage and optimize their AI resource usage more easily.

In the long term, suppliers that can comprehensively manage AI application scenarios for enterprises will be the biggest winners. Facing increasingly complex billing models, buyers are tending to choose comprehensive platforms that offer performance monitoring, strategy execution, and cost control.

content_html_zh:
据权威研究公司Gartner最新预测，全球终端用户在人工智能模型和平台上的支出将出现爆发式增长。 预计到2026年该领域的市场规模将达到640.52亿美元，较去年大幅增长63.4%。

从具体支出来看，生成式AI模型的投资增长尤为迅速，增幅高达117%。 与此同时，企业在AI平台上的支出也在不断扩大，预计将实现36.9%的稳定增长。

市场转向效率优先，成本与回报受到严格审视

随着人工智能技术的广泛实施，企业越来越多地审查人工智能项目的预算。 当前市场关注点已全面转向资金使用效率、成本控制以及能否带来可衡量的实际效益。

面对这一变化，资金正加速流向能够清晰展现价值的供应商。 尤其是那些能够在控制成本、减少延迟、提高性能和确保可靠性方面提供证据的产品更有可能在竞争中脱颖而出。

透明服务成优势，平台供应商将占据主导地位

为了适应这一趋势，许多供应商正在将评估机制、成本透明度和使用情况跟踪直接嵌入到客户工作流程中。 这种方法使公司能够更轻松地管理和优化其人工智能资源的使用。

从长远来看，能够全面为企业管理AI应用场景的供应商将是最大的赢家。 面对日益复杂的计费模式，买家倾向于选择提供绩效监控、策略执行和成本控制的综合平台。
